failedAssertions.reason: No ASCII renderer is present because the shipped visual re-engineering intentionally removes ASCII entirely; this aligns with current mission guidance but fails the stale assertion wording.
Enhanced and forced-fallback screenshots differed by only 0.04%, so the rendered page is not materially distinct between states.
Headed browser validation captured only trace-level frame diffs (0.01% / 0.00%), so visible background motion could not be confirmed.
Cards have the glass base but no cursor-tracking metallic sheen or equivalent liquid-metal interaction.
The shell uses some required tokens, but the hero heading remains sentence case with normal tracking instead of the required all-uppercase, tight-tracked typography.
The roadmap-focused workspace still shows multiple simultaneous control layers instead of one clean navigation model.
